### Post by Redalien0304 on 2013-01-04
Every time i Play Video i get weird color distortions like this screenshot below. I have Dell Latitude D600 (32 Mb of Video Ram) with Win xp & Ubuntu 12.4. Video Playback is fine on Win xp.  Have tried Playing it with Movie Player, Banshee Media player, Vlc Media Player.  Any video or movie does not matter always playback the same with Distortion. streaming is good on Ubuntu can view Videos just fine.
Any Help & Ideas are welcome Thanks
